## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes locally (or I've confirmed CI is green)
- [ ] I built the app (`bash scripts/build-app.sh`) and verified it launches in the menu bar, if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal usage data are included in the diff or screenshots
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior or setup changed
